headline: TI unveils complete 800 VDC power architecture for future generation AI data centers with NVIDIA
summary: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) today unveiled a complete 800V direct current (DC) power architecture for next-generation AI data centers built with the NVIDIA 800 VDC reference design. The solution will be showcased at NVIDIA GTC, March 16-19, 2026, at NVIDIA's power architecture display and TI's booth 169, demonstrating how TI's analog and embedded processing technology supports NVIDIA's vision for advancing high-voltage systems in AI data centers.

content.title: TI unveils complete 800 VDC power architecture for future generation AI data centers with NVIDIA
content.summary: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) today unveiled a complete 800V direct current (DC) power architecture for next-generation AI data centers built with the NVIDIA 800 VDC reference design. The solution will be showcased at NVIDIA GTC, March 16-19, 2026, at NVIDIA's power architecture display and TI's booth 169, demonstrating how TI's analog and embedded processing technology supports NVIDIA's vision for advancing high-voltage systems in AI data centers.

thumbnail.caption: TI's 800 VDC power architecture maximizes conversion efficiency and power density across the entire power path, enabling more scalable and reliable AI data center operations.
